name: Malasaña Triana
quote: Una cocina divertida con una presentación cuidada, lagrimitas, brioche de costilla ahumada
writer_profile: Redactora en Sevilla Secreta. PRIMARY local editorial source. BORDERLINE — extracted text 12 words.

name: El Viejo Tito
quote: un bar de cocina y aspecto tradicionales, tapas, revueltos, carnes, guisos y cazuelas
writer_profile: Redactora en Sevilla Secreta. PRIMARY local editorial source. BORDERLINE — extracted text 13 words.

name: Casa Regina
quote: The corner location has two bars (one with a dining area) and a spacious terrace
writer_profile: Bitesize Sevilla. Local EN food writer, Seville-based. PRIMARY source. Chef: Gonzalo Villalba. Opened April 2025.

name: Don Jorge
quote: Her 'Tasca Fina' offers a combination of traditional dishes with a few fusiony twists
writer_profile: Bitesize Sevilla. Local EN food writer, Seville-based. PRIMARY source. Chef: Ximena Tarazona. Opened May 2025.

name: Salpicón
quote: The focus is on seasonal local products and includes a great selection of 'elevated' montaditos
writer_profile: Bitesize Sevilla. Local EN food writer, Seville-based. PRIMARY source. Chef: Elías Cabrera. Opened August 2025.

name: Amorío
quote: Sherry plays a major part not only on the wine list but in many of the dishes
writer_profile: Bitesize Sevilla. Local EN food writer, Seville-based. PRIMARY source. Chef: Javier Muñoz. Opened October 2025.

name: Las Golondrinas Centro
quote: The beautifully restored El Portón bar is now home to one of the best-loved tapas bars
writer_profile: Bitesize Sevilla. Local EN food writer, Seville-based. PRIMARY source. Owner: José Carlos Arcas. Opened December 2025. Located just off Plaza Nueva.

name: Raíces
quote: Offers both nikkei and novoandina cuisines plus a few surprises, as well as the best pisco sours in town
writer_profile: Bitesize Sevilla. Local EN food writer, Seville-based. PRIMARY source. Chef: Daniel Cárdenas. Opened December 2025.

name: Bar Coliseo
quote: Ubicado en los bajos del hotel Tayko, el espacio se abre paso en uno de los enclaves más privilegiados de Sevilla, dialogando con el pulso histórico de la ciudad.
writer_profile: De Tapas con Chencho. Local Seville food writer, member of the Sevillian Academy of Gastronomy and Tourism. PRIMARY source. Published 19 abril 2026.

name: Morrocotudo
quote: En un entorno donde el bar de barrio forma parte del día a día, con cervecerías de mesas altas y ese tapeo informal que tanto gusta a los sevillanos, Cholo Group ha logrado asentarse entendiendo a la perfección el ritmo y las costumbres de Los Remedios.
writer_profile: De Tapas con Chencho. Local Seville food writer, member of the Sevillian Academy of Gastronomy and Tourism. PRIMARY source. Published 20 abril 2026.

name: Generi Alimentari
quote: Generi Alimentari es el cuarto proyecto del grupo italiano que, desde su llegada a Sevilla en 2019, ha sabido hacerse un hueco entre los imprescindibles de la cocina transalpina en la ciudad.
writer_profile: De Tapas con Chencho. Local Seville food writer, member of the Sevillian Academy of Gastronomy and Tourism. PRIMARY source. Chefs: Ciro and Lorenzo. Published 17 abril 2026.

name: Caladero
quote: Caladero irrumpe en la escena hostelera sevillana como una propuesta fresca que honra esa tradición culinaria andaluza, combinando sabores del mar con un ambiente informal, cercano y lleno de autenticidad.
writer_profile: De Tapas con Chencho. Local Seville food writer, member of the Sevillian Academy of Gastronomy and Tourism. PRIMARY source. Owners: Luis Millán and Leopoldo Parias (Grupo La Isla). Published 8 abril 2025.

name: Rastrojo
quote: La propuesta gastronómica de Rastrojo se apoya en una cocina de raíz tradicional, sin artificios, donde priman el respeto al producto y los sabores reconocibles.
writer_profile: De Tapas con Chencho. Local Seville food writer, member of the Sevillian Academy of Gastronomy and Tourism. PRIMARY source. Chef: Víctor Daniel. Published 19 diciembre 2025.

name: Kinu
quote: Arrinconado en un pasaje que se desvincula de la bulliciosa Avenida de la Constitución y tras una cortina noren y unas escaleras descendentes se ubica discretamente Kinu.
writer_profile: Viajes National Geographic España. Travel/gastronomy writer. SECONDARY source — national/travel audience. Published 16 febrero 2025. Itamae: Maher. Barra omakase sevillana para seis comensales.

name: Castizo
quote: Clásico y sabroso. A Castizo se viene sabiendo lo que uno se va a encontrar en la carta y en la cocina, e incluso en el trato: hogar.
writer_profile: Viajes National Geographic España. Travel/gastronomy writer. SECONDARY source — national/travel audience. Published 16 febrero 2025. Chef: Cristóbal Rosales. Located near Triana bridge.

name: Ricca
quote: Considerada la primera barra omakase de pizzas en Europa, la experiencia está reservada para un máximo de ocho comensales.
writer_profile: Viajes National Geographic España. Travel/gastronomy writer. SECONDARY source — national/travel audience. Published 16 febrero 2025. Menú degustación: tres antipasti, seis porciones de pizza y postre.

name: Señor Cangrejo
quote: Fátima (sumiller) y Jesús (chef) son gran parte del encanto y profesionalidad que rezuma la pequeña, diminuta, cocina de este local.
writer_profile: Viajes National Geographic España. Travel/gastronomy writer. SECONDARY source — national/travel audience. Published 16 febrero 2025. Sol Repsol. Also mentioned in sevillasecreta.co (ES). Dishes: aguachile de maíz con gamba blanca.

name: Casa Orzáez
quote: Nacida como tienda de proximidad basada en la sostenibilidad y el movimiento Slow Food
writer_profile: Viajes National Geographic España. SECONDARY source. BORDERLINE — extracted text 14 words. Terraza con vistas a Torre del Oro. Siblings: María, Eugenia, Claudia y Pablo.

name: Eslava
quote: Known to many as the best tapas bar in Seville, this tiny classic bar has kept its prices very low and the quality high.
writer_profile: Spanish Sabores. Single-author site (Lauren Aloise, full name confirmed on About page). SECONDARY source. ⚠ coi: co-founder of Devour Tours (food tour operator in Seville). Published April 2024.

name: Bodega Santa Cruz
quote: One of the most classic bars on the border of the Santa Cruz neighborhood and only a stone's throw from the cathedral.
writer_profile: Spanish Sabores. Single-author site. SECONDARY source. ⚠ coi: Devour Tours co-founder. Published April 2024.

name: La Azotea
quote: One of the city's best spots for more modern tapas, has multiple locations with a constantly changing seasonal menu.
writer_profile: Spanish Sabores. Single-author site. SECONDARY source. ⚠ coi: Devour Tours co-founder. Published April 2024.

name: La Moneda
quote: Another of my favorite tapas bars in the city center, serves seafood tapas at the bar only.
writer_profile: Spanish Sabores. Single-author site. SECONDARY source. ⚠ coi: Devour Tours co-founder. Published April 2024.

name: Taberna Águilas
quote: One of Seville's most traditional small tapas bars, here you'll find delicious salmorejo and plenty of montaditos.
writer_profile: Spanish Sabores. Single-author site. SECONDARY source. ⚠ coi: Devour Tours co-founder. Published April 2024.

name: ConTenedor
quote: An eclectic space that focuses on top-quality ingredients (many of which are organic), this is a restaurant with no tapas.
writer_profile: Spanish Sabores. Single-author site. SECONDARY source. ⚠ coi: Devour Tours co-founder. Published April 2024.

name: Freiduría La Isla
quote: Seville is famous for fried fish, and my favorite comes from La Isla. Family-run since 1938.
writer_profile: Spanish Sabores. Single-author site. SECONDARY source. ⚠ coi: Devour Tours co-founder. Published April 2024.
